creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
The vast majority of ports name the option to enable PulseAudio support
PULSEAUDIO.  sonic-visualiser currently uses PULSE.  Can we change it to
PULSEAUDIO for consistencies sake?

This also makes it easier for users to disable/enable PulseAudio accross the
ports tree via OPTIONS_SET=PULSEAUDIO in /etc/make.conf without having to
remember to also set PULSE.
